claim: Mistral Agents API is provider-agnostic allowing use of any LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, local models) and swapping models at runtime without code changes
actionable: When designing agent systems, ensure model selection is a runtime configuration rather than hardcoded dependency
source_title: Mistral Agents API - The NEW Agent System

claim: Persistent memory across conversations is a key feature that automatically handles memory transfer between agent interactions without manual state management
actionable: Use persistent memory systems to avoid repetitive context setup in multi-turn agent conversations
source_title: Mistral Agents API - The NEW Agent System

claim: Built-in connectors for agents should include: code execution, web search, image generation, document library for RAG, and MCP tools
actionable: When building agent platforms, provide these standard connectors out-of-the-box to reduce development friction
source_title: Mistral Agents API - The NEW Agent System

claim: Agent orchestration patterns should support both constrained execution (sequential agents, map-reduce workflows) and flexible execution (free agent choice), not just free-form agency
actionable: Provide multiple orchestration modes to developers - use constrained patterns for reliability, flexible patterns for capability
source_title: Mistral Agents API - The NEW Agent System

claim: Multi-agent earnings call analysis patterns work well: preprocess PDFs with OCR, split work to specialized sub-agents (insights, risks, analysis), aggregate using structured output
actionable: For document analysis tasks, use specialized sub-agents with structured output schemas and aggregate results systematically
source_title: Mistral Agents API - The NEW Agent System
